creator: sobomax@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed, thanks! 

Few sidenotes: 
- try in the future avoid mixing variables definition with targets in  
port's Makefile's; 
- learn to use portlint (ports/devel/portlint) to find subtle 
inconsistencies like sed->${SED} etc. 
- this port need additional cleanup to better separate data from 
configuration, i.e. wwwoffle.conf should go into ${PREFIX}/etc, not 
into ${SPOOL}. 

Anyway, good job!
